title: How the live-reload function happens
prompt: Explain how live-reload works in this repository: how filesystem events trigger entry reload and UI refresh.

items.text: Orchestrates live-reload by connecting watcher to signal-driven refresh.
Calls watchWorkspace() to start the filesystem watcher.
Registers SIGNALS.workspaceChanged handler that triggers refreshEntries().
refreshEntries() calls loadCodeFileEntries() to re-scan files.
refreshEntries() calls app.refreshEntries(nextEntries) to update the UI.
Closes watcher on renderer destroy to stop live-reload.
Bridges workspace watcher events into SIGNALS.workspaceChanged emits.
Calls getIgnoredDirs(process.cwd()) to compute ignore set before watching.
Calls workspace.watchWorkspace(root, ignoredDirs, () => emit(SIGNALS.workspaceChanged)).
Uses emit() from signals to broadcast workspaceChanged.
Implements debounced directory watchers and rebuild-on-rename logic.
Creates node fs.watch watchers to observe file changes in directories.
scheduleChange() debounces rapid events before invoking onChange callback.
scheduleRebuild() triggers rebuildWatchers() to recompute watched directories.
listWatchableDirs() uses git ls-files when repository present for efficiency.
Uses git commands to optimize file listing and ignore handling.
Provides in-process pub/sub used to notify app of workspace changes.
emit() synchronously invokes registered handlers with try/catch error handling.
register() stores handlers and returns ids used for deregistration.
loadCodeFileEntries() rescans workspace and returns CodeFileEntry list.
Calls getIgnoredDirs(root) to honor .gitignore and common ignores.
Delegates file listing and optional content reads to workspace.loadCodeFileEntries().
hydrateCodeFileEntry() lazy-loads file content and triggers render when ready.
Applies updated entries to UI; refreshEntries triggers full re-render.
refreshEntries() recomputes types, prunes, and re-renders content and chips.
scheduleFileContentLoad() lazy-loads file content and re-renders when ready.
